elements.sent-2411-001: In this paper, we prove a uniform version of quantum unique ergodicity for high-frequency eigensections of a certain series of unitary flat bundles over arithmetic surfaces.
elements.sent-2411-002: Shnirelman's quantum ergodicity (QE) \cite{MR0402834 states that on a compact Riemannian manifold whose geodesic flow is ergodic with respect to the Liouville measure, the eigenfunctions of the Laplacian tend to be equidistributed except a density zero subsequence.}
elements.sent-2411-003: The quantum unique ergodicity conjecture (QUE) of Rudnick-Sarnak \cite{MR1266075 asserts that for Riemannian manifolds of negative sectional curvature, all eigenfunctions equidistribute.}
elements.sent-2411-004: Lindenstrauss \cite{MR2195133 solved the QUE for arithmetic surfaces (AQUE), which carry additional symmetries called Hecke operators.}
elements.sent-2411-005: These operators commute with each other and with the Laplacian, so it is natural to consider the joint eigenfunctions of the Laplacian and all Hecke operators, called Hecke-Maass forms.
elements.sent-2411-006: In \cite[Theorems 1.3, 4.9]{Ma-Ma , Ma-Ma established a uniform version of QE for a certain series of unitary flat bundles (UQE).}
elements.sent-2411-007: Later, a similar but weaker, non-uniform version of QE was also obtained by Cekić-Thibault \cite[Theorem 5.1.7]{cekić2024semiclassicalanalysisprincipalbundles .}
elements.sent-2411-008: In this paper, we prove the corresponding uniform QUE (UQUE) for arithmetic surfaces (AUQUE).
elements.sent-2411-010: To begin with, we consider the AQUE concerning a single flat bundle.
